name: TA-65 metabolic syndrome phase 1 registry terminated without posted results
summary: A terminated small TA-65 registry is limiting clinical context rather than efficacy evidence.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT01753674 as a terminated phase 1 TA-65 metabolic syndrome registry with 13 enrolled participants and no posted results in the June 10, 2026 API view.
population_or_model: Adults aged 35 to 70 years with metabolic syndrome or insulin resistance
time_horizon: Actual completion listed in June 2014; no posted results as of the June 10, 2026 API view
quantitative_note: Actual enrollment was 13; primary outcome was plasma insulin.
caveats: Termination and small enrollment limit interpretability.
No-results registry status is not evidence of efficacy.
The metabolic-syndrome scope is disease-context evidence, not broad aging evidence.
